top_signals.title: India’s RBI Governor Says Premature to Discuss Rate Hike
top_signals.summary: India’s central bank Governor Sanjay Malhotra said it’s still “premature” to talk about an interest rate hike given ongoing geopolitical uncertainties, noting future decisions will be guided by incoming data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: US Army tests autonomous boats during Philippine exercise
top_signals.summary: Autonomous boats helped escort a U.S. Army vessel during a military exercise, in a demonstration of how uncrewed assets are changing maritime operations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: China Unfazed by World’s Ire on Trade as Premier Touts Openness
top_signals.summary: Beijing’s No. 2 official played down worries about the disruption wrought by his country’s surging exports on the global economy, championing the benefits provided to the world by China’s development.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
